description: A close-up view of a wooden dovecote with a conical roof topped by a dark finial. Several pigeons and doves in various plumages -- white, russet, brown-speckled, and reddish -- perch on and around the octagonal shelter, some nestled within its openings and others on its rim. A snail clings to the lower edge of the structure. Behind, a hazy urban skyline of rooftops, chimneys, and a church spire stretches out under a soft, overcast twilight sky. Scattered corn husks and feathers rest on the ledge below. The rendering is hyper-detailed and naturalistic.

_meta.title: The Festival of St. Swithin or The Dovecote
